STREET TILE ROLES — you assign the jobs

Every approved street/hazard tile shown as a 3-run in BOTH orientations. Tap the role each tile actually plays on a real Vegas street: thin LANE DIVIDER (same-direction lanes), fat MEDIAN (opposing traffic, u-turn room), CROSSWALK, EDGE/SHOULDER, PLAIN street, or NOT STREET. Notes box for anything (autosaves every tap).
